c65cbe95-e96a-4b7d-8618-2442c2f394cd.label: text_chunk
c65cbe95-e96a-4b7d-8618-2442c2f394cd.text:
CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEEMENT between TRANSNET LIMITED and ______________________________________________________
(“insert name”)

CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This agreement (“Agreement”) is entered into as of the date first written below (the “Effective Date”) by and between TRANSNET LIMITED (hereinafter referred to as “Transnet” or “the Disclosing Party”) having as its principal place of business at 38 th Floor,

0457ce65-e9c3-4ba4-959d-7a968fb51687.label: text_chunk
0457ce65-e9c3-4ba4-959d-7a968fb51687.text: Carlton Centre, Johannesburg, 2001, and ___________________________________ (Registration number____________________)  (hereinafter referred to as “the Bidder” or the “Receiving Party”) with its principal place of business at __________________________________________ (Transnet and the Bidder shall hereinafter referred to as the “Parties”).

a334954a-227f-4cb3-abf2-86ce903a6be0.label: text_chunk
a334954a-227f-4cb3-abf2-86ce903a6be0.text:
WHEREAS, the Bidder is interested in participating in the disposal process being undertaken by Transnet in relation to the business of Luxrail (hereinafter referred to as “the Blue Train” or “the Target”) (such disposal hereinafter referred to as the “Proposed Transaction”);
AND WHEREAS, it is agreed that in order to enable the Bidder to assess the Target, Transnet will disclose Confidential Information relevant to the Proposed Transaction to the Bidder;

6bf2c0e0-012b-4162-832c-65f174b2906e.label: text_chunk
6bf2c0e0-012b-4162-832c-65f174b2906e.text:
AND WHEREAS, the Bidder recognises that careful protection and non-disclosure by the Bidder of Confidential Information disclosed by Transnet is of vital importance to the prosperity of the Target, Transnet and clientele of Transnet;
NOW THEREFORE, Transnet agrees to disclose the Confidential Information and the Bidder agrees to receive the Confidential Information under the following terms and conditions.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

1.1 Definition.

653e0722-6fc6-47aa-802d-0ef181f44fcb.label: text_chunk
653e0722-6fc6-47aa-802d-0ef181f44fcb.text:
When used herein,

 Confidential Information shall mean any information and data (in electronic form, in hard copy or given verbally) of a confidential or proprietary nature which is disclosed by the Disclosing Party to the Receiving Party, including but not limited to, group corporate strategy and initiatives, customer information, Target information, proprietary technical, financial, personnel and/or commercial information with respect to the Proposed Transaction, Transnet or the Target and any information which is disclosed pursuant to this

2695e432-615c-409d-ba63-7f45e69883cd.label: text_chunk
2695e432-615c-409d-ba63-7f45e69883cd.text:
Agreement and marked “Confidential” by the Disclosing Party. Confidential information specifically excludes the following:

1.1.

1.1  information which is in the public domain or enters the public domain other than by reason of a breach of the terms of this Agreement;

1.1.

ec0a89a9-bb4f-4b01-ae64-265e9119beab.label: text_chunk
ec0a89a9-bb4f-4b01-ae64-265e9119beab.text:
1.2 where it becomes available to the Receiving Party on a non-confidential basis from a source other than the Disclosing Party or the individual members of the Disclosing Party, as the case may be;

1.1.

986a4ecb-9ffc-4d4d-81dd-e0604d6adc62.label: text_chunk
986a4ecb-9ffc-4d4d-81dd-e0604d6adc62.text:
1.3 where it was known to the Receiving Party prior to having access to the Confidential information; and

1.1.4  where the Receiving Party is obliged to disclose by law,

 or by order or under the rules of any competent regulatory authority or court.

1.2 Purpose.

 The purpose of the disclosure of Confidential Information is to enable the Target’s assets and liabilities relevant to the Proposed Transaction to be assessed.

1.3 Ownership.

1fb5d532-e766-4e4c-8dec-6424264a6a57.label: text_chunk
1fb5d532-e766-4e4c-8dec-6424264a6a57.text:
The Confidential Information is and shall be considered valuable trade secrets owned exclusively by the Disclosing Party. The Disclosing Party retains all right, title and interest in the Confidential Information and any reasonably related information which may be subsequently developed, and the Receiving Party waives all rights to the intellectual property and copyright therein in favour of the Disclosing Party.

1.4 No License.

0a71b2f1-be1a-4e03-a628-0956d095a61e.label: text_chunk
0a71b2f1-be1a-4e03-a628-0956d095a61e.text:
No license is granted to the Receiving Party in relation to any intellectual property rights that attach to or may be embodied in any Confidential Information, or is implied by the conveying of such Confidential Information to the Receiving Party.

1.5 No Warranties.

45d33ea7-0ed7-43a6-82e6-790328a76d73.label: text_chunk
45d33ea7-0ed7-43a6-82e6-790328a76d73.text:
The Disclosing Party assumes no responsibility for any loss or damages suffered by the Receiving Party or any third party caused by or arising from the Confidential Information, and the Disclosing Party makes no warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of the Confidential Information.

1.6 Authorised.

 The Disclosing Party is authorised to provide Confidential Information to the Receiving Party.

2. NON-DISCLOSURE

2.1 Use of Confidential Information.

d441c1fb-b051-4318-8f77-ee2d5d5584d8.label: text_chunk
d441c1fb-b051-4318-8f77-ee2d5d5584d8.text: The Receiving Party may use the Confidential Information solely for the purposes of assessing the Target for purposes of the Proposed Transaction.  The Receiving Party recognises that this Agreement imposes an affirmative duty to hold such information in confidence and protect it from dissemination to and use by any unauthorised persons. In the absence of the Disclosing Party’s prior written consent, the Receiving Party shall not produce nor disclose the Confidential Information, or any part thereof, to any third party.

a2e8a91e-3386-4db4-b92d-c4706f88ae40.label: text_chunk
a2e8a91e-3386-4db4-b92d-c4706f88ae40.text: The Confidential Information is proprietary information and for the exclusive and non-transferable use of the persons to whom it is addressed and the recipients of the Confidential Information agree that all of the information contained herein is of a confidential nature and is subject to this Confidentiality Agreement, and that they will not, directly, or indirectly, disclose or permit their agents or affiliates to disclose any such information without the prior written consent of Transnet except as expressly permitted by the terms of this Agreement.

81010066-cfe0-40b4-821e-2fb6ecbdc8df.label: text_chunk
81010066-cfe0-40b4-821e-2fb6ecbdc8df.text:
2.3 Return of Confidential Information. Promptly following the request of the Disclosing Party,

 the Receiving Party will deliver to the Disclosing Party all confidential information (and copies and extracts thereof) furnished to, or created by or on behalf of, the Receiving Party. Notwithstanding the return of the Confidential Information, the Receiving Party will continue to be bound by its obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.

2.4 Remedies.

9e7e0148-881d-4203-8c3d-679cf6263e9c.label: text_chunk
9e7e0148-881d-4203-8c3d-679cf6263e9c.text:
The Receiving Party recognises and acknowledges that the Confidential Information is of a special, unique and extraordinary character to the Disclosing Party and the Target and the disclosure, misappropriation or
unauthorised use of such Confidential Information by the Receiving Party cannot be fully compensated and that, further, any such disclosure, misappropriation or unauthorised use of the Confidential Information shall cause irreparable injury to the Disclosing Party and/or the Target.

bc46cae2-cb88-4ac1-826f-165393173bdd.label: text_chunk
bc46cae2-cb88-4ac1-826f-165393173bdd.text: The Receiving Party expressly agrees, therefore, that the Disclosing Party, in addition to any rights and remedies it may have under this Agreement or at law or in equity, shall be entitled to seek injunctive and other equitable relief to prevent the breach, or the further breach, of any of the provisions of this Agreement.

e6e4e92c-1d85-456d-aedb-ca513f5b1154.label: text_chunk
e6e4e92c-1d85-456d-aedb-ca513f5b1154.text:
The Receiving Party agrees to reimburse the Disclosing Party for any and all losses, liabilities, damages, costs, opportunity costs, and direct or indirect expenses (including reasonable attorney’s fees, profit opportunity returns foregone and any court costs) incurred by the Disclosing Party as a result of any prima facie breach of this Agreement by the Receiving Party.

3. GENERAL

3.1 Term and Termination.

269ced40-851c-453b-8aa4-6e24649076c0.label: text_chunk
269ced40-851c-453b-8aa4-6e24649076c0.text:
Notwithstanding whether or not the Proposed Transactions are concluded,

 the Receiving Party shall maintain the Confidential Information in confidence and in accordance with the terms of this Agreement for a period of five (5) years from the date of disclosure.

3.2 Binding Successors.

 This agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the Parties and their successors and assigns.

3.3 Waiver.

bb74847c-f25d-4112-8e6f-7fba2749b750.label: text_chunk
bb74847c-f25d-4112-8e6f-7fba2749b750.text: The waiver or failure of either Party to exercise in any respect any right provided for in this Agreement shall not be deemed a waiver of any further right under this Agreement. If any provision of this Agreement is held by a court of competent jurisdiction to be contrary to law or otherwise unenforceable, it shall be enforced to the extent legally permissible and as necessary to reflect the intent of the Parties and shall not affect the remaining provisions of this Agreement, which shall remain in full force and effect.

9b669aaa-a544-48d2-b8fe-cc9654d701bf.label: text_chunk
9b669aaa-a544-48d2-b8fe-cc9654d701bf.text:
3.4 Variation. No amendment, alteration,

 addition or variation of the Agreement or any provision or term thereof, or any agreement or other document issued or executed
pursuant to or in terms of this Agreement shall be binding unless recorded in a written document signed by the Parties.

3.5 Binding Agreement.

 This Agreement is binding upon each Party and the Receiving Party shall procure that it becomes binding on its respective agents, affiliates, partners, employees, advisors and consultants.

02639763-53c7-4f7c-a378-4a95c8367964.label: text_chunk
02639763-53c7-4f7c-a378-4a95c8367964.text:
3.6 Jurisdiction.

 This Agreement shall be deemed to be a contract made under the laws of the Republic of South Africa and shall be governed by such laws without reference to any principles relating to resolving conflicts of law. The distribution of the Confidential Information in overseas jurisdictions may be restricted by law and therefore persons into whose possession that Confidential Information comes should inform themselves about and observe any such restrictions.

3.7 Copyrights and Proprietary Rights.

c413b676-efbf-4b6d-9a19-62df7506e428.label: text_chunk
c413b676-efbf-4b6d-9a19-62df7506e428.text:
The Receiving Party shall not remove any copyright or proprietary rights notice attached to or included in the Confidential Information.

3.8 Entire Agreement.

 This Agreement represents the entire agreement between Parties with respect to the subject matter of this Agreement.

3.9 Storage of Confidential Information.

6b1a9c91-59b3-407f-859e-6f0cb1e7816e.label: text_chunk
6b1a9c91-59b3-407f-859e-6f0cb1e7816e.text:
The Confidential Information must not be copied, reproduced,

 distributed, stored digitally or by other means, or passed to others at any time other than in accordance with this Confidentiality Agreement or with the prior written consent of Transnet.IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have duly executed this document as of the date first written below.Signed for Transnet Limited by__________________________________, in his/her capacity as _______________________________ on this _____ day of _________________ 2007.

community_summary.1:
The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph involve the entity Transnet and its interactions with various parties, highlighting its significant role in business dealings and information sharing.

1. **Transnet and Target**: Transnet discloses confidential information that is crucial for the Target's success. This relationship underscores the importance of Transnet's actions in influencing the prosperity of the Target.

2. **Transnet and Bidder**: There exists a contractual relationship between Transnet and a Bidder, indicating that the Bidder is likely engaged in submitting a proposal or bid to Transnet. This relationship emphasizes the competitive nature of the bidding process and Transnet's role as a key player.

3. **Transnet and Luxrail**: Transnet is facilitating the disposal process related to Luxrail's business operations. This relationship highlights Transnet's involvement in managing and overseeing significant business transactions.

Overall, Transnet is depicted as a pivotal entity that not only shares vital information but also engages in contractual agreements and facilitates important business processes, thereby impacting the success of its partners and stakeholders.

community_summary.3:
The relationships outlined involve the entity "Bidder" and its interactions with "Transnet" and the concept of a "Receiving Party." 

1. **Bidder and Receiving Party**: The Bidder is identified as the Receiving Party in the context of an agreement, which signifies that the Bidder is the entity receiving information or goods from another party.

2. **Bidder's Interest in Transnet**: The Bidder expresses interest in participating in the disposal process conducted by Transnet, indicating a proactive engagement in potential business opportunities.

3. **Information Exchange**: The Bidder agrees to receive Confidential Information from Transnet, establishing a direct relationship where the Bidder is the recipient of sensitive information necessary for their participation in the disposal process.

Overall, these relationships highlight the Bidder's role as a recipient of information and an interested participant in Transnet's disposal activities, emphasizing the importance of confidentiality and engagement in the process.
community_summary.4: The relationship between the Proposed Transaction and the Target highlights that the Proposed Transaction is centered around the Target, which is the entity involved in the transaction. This relationship indicates that the transaction may necessitate the sharing of Confidential Information pertaining to the Target's operations, emphasizing the importance of confidentiality and the operational relevance of the Target in the context of the transaction.
community_summary.5:
### Summary of Relationships

1. **Receiving Party and Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party is responsible for receiving and protecting Confidential Information, which is characterized as unique and extraordinary.

2. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party waives all rights to intellectual property and copyright in favor of the Disclosing Party. Additionally, the Receiving Party must return the Confidential Information upon request and is obligated to reimburse the Disclosing Party for any losses resulting from breaches of the Agreement.

3. **Receiving Party and Target**: The Receiving Party is permitted to use the Confidential Information specifically for assessing the Target in relation to a Proposed Transaction, indicating a direct evaluative relationship.

4. **Compliance and Responsibility**: The Receiving Party plays a crucial role within the Parties, ensuring that its agents and affiliates comply with the terms of the Agreement.

Overall, the relationships highlight the responsibilities and obligations of the Receiving Party in handling Confidential Information, its evaluative role concerning the Target, and its commitments to the Disclosing Party regarding intellectual property rights and confidentiality.
community_summary.6: In the context of a Proposed Transaction, the Target's assets and liabilities are evaluated. This assessment is crucial for understanding the financial implications and overall viability of the transaction involving the Target. The relationship emphasizes the importance of thorough evaluation in the decision-making process related to the Proposed Transaction.

This indicates a significant legal and operational authority that Transnet has regarding the management and protection of sensitive information.
community_summary.8:

This Agreement outlines and governs the rights and obligations of the Parties involved, establishing a formal framework for their interactions and responsibilities. The significance of this relationship lies in the legal and operational structure it provides, ensuring that both Parties adhere to the agreed-upon terms.

This indicates that the Party is legally obligated to adhere to the terms and conditions specified in the Agreement. community_summary.10: The relationships highlight the Republic of South Africa's legal framework concerning Confidential Information. Specifically, the laws of the Republic of South Africa govern how Confidential Information is handled and distributed, ensuring that all legal matters related to this information comply with South African law. community_summary.11:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party provides Confidential Information to the Receiving Party as part of their agreement. This exchange is a standard practice in confidentiality agreements, where the Disclosing Party shares valuable information while ensuring its protection.

2. **Ownership of Confidential Information**: The Disclosing Party owns the Confidential Information, which is regarded as valuable trade secrets. This ownership underscores the importance of safeguarding the information from unauthorized use.

3. **Concerns about Misappropriation**: Both the Disclosing Party and the Target express concerns regarding the potential unauthorized use and misappropriation of the Confidential Information. Such actions could lead to irreparable harm to both parties.

4. **Governance by Agreement**: The relationship between the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party is governed by an Agreement that outlines the terms and conditions for handling confidential information. The Disclosing Party is a party to this Agreement, which formalizes their obligations and rights in relation to the shared information.

Overall, these relationships highlight the critical nature of confidentiality in business dealings, emphasizing the protection of sensitive information and the legal frameworks that support these interactions.
community_summary.12: Transnet Limited is identified as a signatory to a Confidentiality Agreement, highlighting its role as a party that has executed this agreement. This indicates Transnet Limited's commitment to maintaining confidentiality in the context of the agreement.
community_summary.13:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight the significance of an Agreement in the context of Confidential Information and its formalization through a Timestamp. 

1. **Agreement and Confidential Information**: The Agreement serves as a governing document that dictates how Confidential Information is to be handled and protected between the involved Parties. This emphasizes the importance of confidentiality in their interactions.

2. **Agreement and Date**: The Date associated with the Agreement marks the official signing, which signifies the commencement of the terms specified within the document. This establishes a clear timeline for when the obligations and protections outlined in the Agreement take effect.

Overall, the relationships underscore the critical role of the Agreement in ensuring the confidentiality of sensitive information and the importance of the Date in initiating the legal framework governing these interactions.

Disclosure inherently involves making confidential information known to others, emphasizing the significance of confidentiality in the context of information sharing. This relationship highlights the critical nature of protecting sensitive data during the disclosure process.
community_summary.15:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight the interconnectedness of contracts, transactions, interests, tenure, and documents. 

1. **Contract and Transaction**: A contract is fundamentally linked to a transaction, as it specifies the terms for the exchange of goods, services, or money between parties. This relationship emphasizes the contractual framework that governs transactions.

2. **Interest and Transaction**: Interest plays a significant role in transactions, indicating that they can have positive or negative implications for individuals or groups involved. This relationship underscores the importance of understanding the potential impacts of transactions.

3. **Tenure and Documents**: During their tenure, individuals are responsible for managing various documents, including emails and files, which are essential for fulfilling their roles. This relationship highlights the administrative aspect of tenure and the importance of documentation in professional responsibilities.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the critical roles that contracts, interests, and documentation play in the context of transactions and professional tenure.

The relationships outlined involve the SAMED Board and the South African Medical Devices Industry Association (SAMED). 

1. **SAMED Board and South African Medical Devices Industry Association**: The SAMED Board plays a crucial role in representing the interests of the South African Medical Devices Industry Association. 2. **Membership within the SAMED Board**: The SAMED Board comprises Members who are integral to its governance. In summary, the SAMED Board serves as a vital representative body for the South African Medical Devices Industry Association, with its Members actively participating in governance and decision-making to advocate for the industry's interests.

**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Board and Board Members**: The Board is composed of Board Members who actively participate in its governance, indicating a collaborative structure for decision-making.

2. **Board and Chair**: The Chair leads the Board, guiding meetings and decisions, and plays a crucial role in communication by informing members about meeting adjournments and future reconvening.

3. **Board and Public Accessibility**: The Board has the authority to declare which matters are accessible to the public, highlighting its responsibility in managing public access to information.

4. **Board and SAMED Constitution**: The Board operates under the SAMED Constitution, which provides a legal framework for its actions and decisions, ensuring compliance and governance.

5. **Board and Committee Oversight**: The Board oversees the activities of various Committees, ensuring they align with the organization's goals and policies, indicating a supervisory relationship.

6. **Board and Committee Membership**: Members of the Board may also serve on Committees, illustrating a hierarchical relationship where the Board maintains oversight over Committee functions.

This summary encapsulates the essential relationships and roles within the governance structure, emphasizing the Board's leadership, oversight, and regulatory responsibilities.

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.

6. **Traffic Signals Infrastructure**: The City maintains traffic signals as part of its infrastructure, which are essential for managing vehicular flow and ensuring public safety on the roads.

Overall, these relationships demonstrate the City's proactive management of infrastructure, collaboration with key agencies, and commitment to effective urban planning and disaster recovery.

The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.
